meaning: n.(果实等的)外壳,船体,Hull赫尔
examples: She runs a general practice in Hull.
They got married and set up home together in Hull.
They climbed onto the upturned hull and waited to be rescued.
Hull Road ward councillor Neil Barnes said it had been a "proud moment for York".
Approximately 30 percent of the cottonseed's weight is in the hull, or outer covering.
